'''CSL (SEE eh sel) Danenberger''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the planet [[Kyrouac]].

==Biography==
[[File:CSLDanenbergerPartyGuy-C32.jpg|thumb|right|CSL Danenberger in a bar brawl.]]
CSL Danenberger had always dreamed of becoming a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], though the youth was thought of as crazy by other Kyrouaquians. When the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sent diplomats to Kyrouac in an attempt to get them to supply them with food supplies, it was Danenberger who warned them of the treachery of one of the [[Kyrouaquian High Council]] members. After Danenberger informed them of this, they agreed to take the youth off the planet.
